tasks.description: Add empty-state hint in tool-detail-panel.tsx Step Usage section when a tool has no linked steps. Show message like 'No steps linked yet. Open a step on the canvas and assign this tool.'
acceptance_criteria: When a tool has 0 linked steps, the Step Usage section shows a muted hint message instead of being empty
Hint text: 'No steps linked yet. Open a step on the canvas and assign this tool.' (or similar)
Hint uses text-white/30 or text-white/55 styling consistent with other empty states in the codebase
When steps ARE linked, the existing clickable step list renders as before (no regression)

patterns_to_follow: Existing empty state patterns use text-white/30 with italic hint text

tasks.special_instructions: The Step Usage section was made clickable in IMP-102 (iter 136). Find the section where steps are listed and add an empty state when the array is empty. Check existing empty states in annotation-panel.tsx or comment-panel.tsx for styling patterns.

tasks.description: Add 'last generated' visual indicator near the AI Suggestions button on the improvements page when cached suggestions exist.
acceptance_criteria: When AI suggestions have been previously generated, a 'Last generated X ago' or timestamp label appears near the AI Suggestions button
When no suggestions have been generated yet, no label is shown
Label uses muted text styling (text-white/30 or text-white/55)
Existing AI Suggestions button functionality unchanged

patterns_to_follow: AI analysis page shows 'Last run: X' timestamp. Use similar pattern. Suggestions are cached in localStorage (key likely has workspace ID).
learnings_relevant: OpenRouter API pattern (FEAT-036) — cached results pattern

tasks.special_instructions: Check how the AI suggestions cache works in improvements-view.tsx. The suggestions are likely stored in localStorage with a timestamp. Add a small text element showing the timestamp near the button. Look at ai-analysis-view.tsx for the 'Last run' pattern to follow.

tasks.description: Consolidate the two separate gap analysis guidance messages into a single linked sentence when no maturity data exists.
acceptance_criteria: When no maturity data exists, a single consolidated hint message appears instead of two separate messages
The consolidated message includes a link to the canvas (preserving the existing navigation)
When maturity data exists, the gap analysis table and AI narrative render normally (no regression)
Text styling consistent with existing gap analysis page

patterns_to_follow: Existing text uses text-white/55 for secondary guidance. Links use text-accent-blue with hover underline.

tasks.special_instructions: Two messages currently exist: 'Score steps to enable AI narrative.' (inline) and 'Open the canvas to set maturity scores →' (link below). Merge into one sentence with a link. E.g. 'Open the canvas to set maturity scores on steps to enable gap analysis and AI narrative →'.

shared_files.note: No shared file modifications needed — all tasks are isolated UI improvements
